hops.context: Ours 95.0% Intersection, 76.3% T-junction, 90.2% Straight Road compared to SoVAR 93.3% Intersection, 72.7% T-junction, 82.0% Straight Road
The accuracy of collision trajectory planning of AccidentSim is compared to SoVAR across different road types

question: In the context of evaluating collision trajectory planning accuracy on different road types, how does AccidentSim's performance on a T-junction compare to SoVAR?

options.A: AccidentSim and SoVAR have equal performance on T-junctions with no notable difference in accuracy.
options.B: SoVAR outperforms AccidentSim at T-junctions, reflecting a higher accuracy in handling complex road intersections.
options.C: AccidentSim shows a significant improvement over SoVAR with a higher accuracy percentage at T-junctions.
options.D: Both AccidentSim and SoVAR have decreased performance on T-junctions compared to straight roads, but SoVAR is slightly better.

explanation: Based on the given data from the paper, AccidentSim achieved 76.3% accuracy on T-junctions compared to SoVAR's 72.7%, indicating a significant improvement of AccidentSim over SoVAR on this specific road type.
context: Ours 95.0% Intersection, 76.3% T-junction, 90.2% Straight Road compared to SoVAR 93.3% Intersection, 72.7% T-junction, 82.0% Straight Road | The accuracy of collision trajectory planning of AccidentSim is compared to SoVAR across different road types | T-junction (109)
